ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "agency_code" TEXT /* Code of the agency representing the customer */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel through which the customer interacts */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_agency_code FOREIGN KEY ("agency_code") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product (e.g., Customized Plan) */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., Airlines, Travel Agency) */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination for the product (e.g., Asia, Americas) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the product/service (in days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_code" TEXT /* Code representing the travel agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the travel agency */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of agency (e.g., Airlines, Travel Agency) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the agency */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel (e.g., Online, In-Person) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer making the purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being sold */,
  "agency_code" TEXT /* Code of the agency involved in the sale */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel through which the sale was made */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_amount" REAL /* Amount of sales made */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate applicable to the sale */,
  "claimed" TEXT /* Indicates if the sale was claimed (Yes/No) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_agency_code FOREIGN KEY ("agency_code") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commissions" (
  "commission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commission record */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sale associated with the commission */,
  "commission_amount" REAL /* Amount of commission earned from the sale */,
  "commission_date" TEXT /* Date the commission was paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commissions_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_report" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales report */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales made in the reporting period */,
  "total_commission" REAL /* Total commission earned in the reporting period */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report generation */,
  "agency_code" TEXT /* Code of the agency being reported */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel being reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_report_agency_code FOREIGN KEY ("agency_code") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_report_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales agent */,
  "agency_code" TEXT /* Code of the agency the agent belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_sales" (
  "agent_sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent sale */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agent making the sale */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sale made by the agent */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_amount" REAL /* Amount of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_sales_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)
